data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"epicId":"e471-dda3","generatedAt":"2026-04-10T11:22:14Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Confluence Integration: Contextual Research and Best-Practices Reference Library","description":"Shared confluence-fetch.sh (auth+cache), /tmp/dso-ref-cache/ 1-hour TTL, dso:confluence-researcher sub-agent, ref-library-loader.sh. Phase 1: fetch infra + researcher + brainstorm/roadmap integration. Phase 2: citation injection for implementation-plan.","successCriteria":["dso:confluence-researcher dispatched at end of brainstorm Phase 1; auto-derives CQL keywords; returns top 5 summaries (configurable via confluence.max_results)","implementation-plan tasks matching topic-tag filter AND LLM relevance judgment annotated with citation format","/tmp/dso-ref-cache/ with 1-hour mtime TTL; cache hits emit [cache hit: <url>] to stderr","Reference URL list configurable in dso-config.conf with per-URL topic tags; no code change to add new reference","Missing CONFLUENCE_EMAIL/CONFLUENCE_API_TOKEN skips Confluence URLs with stderr warning","confluence.roadmap_research_enabled=true dispatches researcher during roadmap exploration","CQL zero results emits [confluence-research: no results for query: <keywords>] and continues","Integration test suite tests/integration/test-confluence-integration.sh validates via local HTTP stub"]},"stories":[{"id":"5801-3aa8","title":"Write failing integration tests for Confluence integration","description":"TDD test story \u2014 tests/integration/test-confluence-integration.sh with local HTTP stub covering researcher keyword match, cache TTL behavior, and citation format","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["tests/integration/test-confluence-integration.sh exists and covers tests (a), (b), (c) using local HTTP stub","All tests confirmed FAIL (RED) before implementation begins; failing run recorded as ticket comment"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 8 \u2014 integration test suite"},{"id":"e040-3d27","title":"As a DSO agent, I can fetch and cache Confluence and public reference URLs through a shared authenticated script","description":"confluence-fetch.sh with auth detection, curl-L tiny link resolution, /tmp/dso-ref-cache/ 1hr TTL, creds warning, config keys","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["confluence-fetch.sh fetches URLs with Basic Auth for Confluence domain; public URLs without auth","1-hour mtime TTL cache in /tmp/dso-ref-cache/; [cache hit: <url>] stderr on cache hit","Missing creds skips Confluence URLs with stderr warning","Tiny links resolved via curl -L","Config keys parseable without code change","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["Security: token masking","Security: base_url domain match","Reliability: /tmp access","Reliability: file locking for concurrent writes","Maintainability: no auth duplication"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["5801-3aa8"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 3, SC 4, SC 5"},{"id":"b5e2-abd6","title":"As a brainstorm session participant, I can automatically discover relevant Confluence content during feature exploration without manually providing URLs","description":"dso:confluence-researcher agent with CQL keyword derivation + brainstorm SKILL.md dispatch at end of Phase 1 understanding loop","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["researcher auto-derives CQL keywords; queries /wiki/rest/api/search?cql=...; returns top N summaries","Zero results emits [confluence-research: no results for query: <keywords>] and continues","brainstorm Phase 1 dispatches researcher; result appended as 'Confluence Research' section","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["Testing: mock HTTP fixture","Reliability: nesting gate","Reliability: pre-dispatch creds gate","Integration: 50-result cap; first-page sufficient for top-5"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["5801-3aa8","e040-3d27"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 1, SC 7"},{"id":"f8c4-2d3d","title":"As a roadmap planning session, I can optionally pull Confluence context into the exploration phase by setting a configuration flag","description":"roadmap SKILL.md dispatches dso:confluence-researcher when confluence.roadmap_research_enabled=true; silent skip otherwise","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["flag=true dispatches researcher at roadmap exploration start","flag absent/false skips silently","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["Reliability: flag absent = false","Compatibility: roadmap theme vs brainstorm feature context for CQL derivation"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["5801-3aa8","b5e2-abd6"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 6"},{"id":"5f59-753f","title":"As an implementation-plan agent, I can annotate task descriptions with cited reference documentation relevant to the task topic","description":"ref-library-loader.sh reads config, applies coarse tag filter + LLM relevance judgment, annotates tasks with citation format; implementation-plan SKILL.md integration","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["ref-library-loader.sh reads config, applies tag filter, LLM relevance judgment (capped at 20), annotates with citation format","Tasks with no matches generated without annotation, no error","implementation-plan SKILL.md calls ref-library-loader.sh during task generation","Config extensible via config-only change","Unit tests passing"],"considerations":["Performance: cap post-filter set at 20","Maintainability: route through confluence-fetch.sh","Testing: stub fixture for citations"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["5801-3aa8","e040-3d27"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC 2, SC 4"},{"id":"2cce-42e0","title":"Update project docs to reflect Confluence integration","description":"CLAUDE.md architecture entries, dso-config.conf comment block for confluence.* keys, KNOWN-ISSUES.md /tmp and nesting limitations","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md references confluence-fetch.sh, dso:confluence-researcher, ref-library-loader.sh","dso-config.conf documents all confluence.* keys","KNOWN-ISSUES.md has /tmp access and sub-agent nesting entries"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["e040-3d27","b5e2-abd6","f8c4-2d3d","5f59-753f"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Approach \u2014 infrastructure documentation"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["5801-3aa8","e040-3d27","b5e2-abd6"]}}
